title: What the inside of Flying Saucers looks like

transcript.text: Hi, hello. This video is the interior of spaceships. Have you ever thought about what the interior of an extraterrestrial spaceship looks like? I sure have. Well, from what I understand is that, and this is from, let's see, Bob Lazar. He was a guy who was contracted by the government. He worked for MJ-12 in Area 51 to try and back engineer.

I think this flying saucer that crashed in Roswell. I think they had a couple of them that crashed. The one who crashed in Roswell was humans from the future, apparently, the first graze, who, I think there was actually a human with them, who got struck by lightning and they crashed.
So, anyways, he saw it and it would, like, shoot up in the sky with this little tuff of light underneath it and hover around. But, anyway, he used the element of a team. I talked about that before.
But, anyway, he goes inside of it and they control this thing with these little hand, these little indentions for the hands with these little dots. I saw the photos of it.

So, I guess you put your hand on it and then out of your little finger chakra, you can send your thought pulses to communicate with your ship. And, um, so that's how they fly them. Um, I guess, okay, now, according to Bashar, who is a hybrid human alien, um, hybrid gray alien human hybrid, um, he says that their ships are alive. They're actually conscious. They're self-conscious.

Um, so that's interesting. Now, the inside of the ship is, um, very, like when Bob Lazar went into it, he said it was really interesting because it's not how you would imagine a room to look like.
Like they, they didn't use, they didn't, like, they didn't use a very, uh, didn't make a whole lot of sense how they, um, how they occupied the space.
Like it didn't, like they wouldn't be able to pack as much stuff in there as, as, as we could if we designed it.

Cause there was no angles. It was all round. It was all curvatures to everything. And there was no, uh, seam. Like if you see a car, you would see the seam where the two pieces of metal go together with the little rubber or, uh, you know, glue that would hold it together or whatever.
But there's absolutely no seam in just, um, in the inside or outside of the spaceship. And they actually, you know, like the door, not even for the door, the door, there was no seam.
The door would just appear out of nothing. Like it, like the ship is actually, uh, liquid. You know how you would melt down liquid?

And it would just melt all together and then it would open up. So, um, Bashar said, it's kind of like, uh, so like a template. Like if, and I was actually compared it to like website, I think computers and websites are kind of similar to that.
And that, uh, you have these different templates that you use and you plug it in and then boom, you have a whole new structure and then you plug it in a whole new structure in there.

Only, only it's good.
